label: Yield Curve Duration
signal: Set Treasury duration from the 10y-2y curve slope.
description: Duration timing on the curve slope: T10Y2Y>0.5% → long duration (20yr), <0% → short duration (2yr), else 10yr. Synthetic FRED yields, duration-model price returns, monthly, 5bps/side.
reference: Duration timing on yield-curve signals; cf. Koijen, Moskowitz, Pedersen & Vrugt (2018), 'Carry'
